site.name: QR Photo Gallery
site.og_image_alt: A collage of candid photos captured by guests at a celebration
footer.tagline: The simplest way to collect every guest photo and video in original quality.
landing.title: QR Photo Gallery — collect every event photo in original quality
landing.meta_description: One QR code for every guest photo and video. No app, no accounts, no compression. 100 GB of GDPR-compliant EU storage for one year from €19.
landing.hero.subtitle: Guests scan, choose their photos or videos, and upload. You get every original in one beautiful gallery — no app and no guest accounts.
landing.hero.note: One-time payment · available for 1 year · 100 GB included
landing.how.title: From zero to shared gallery in minutes
landing.how.step1.title: Create your gallery
landing.how.step1.text: Give it a name, choose a look, and your private gallery is ready.
landing.how.step2.title: Share one QR code
landing.how.step2.text: Download the ready-to-print poster or put the QR code on your own signs.
landing.how.step3.title: Guests upload
landing.how.step3.text: Photos and videos go straight from their browser into your gallery in original quality.
landing.features.title: Deliberately simple. Seriously capable.
landing.features.f1.title: No app, no account
landing.features.f1.text: Guests scan a QR code and upload straight from the browser. Zero friction, so everyone joins in.
landing.features.f2.title: Photos and videos
landing.features.f2.text: JPG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, MP4, MOV, WebM and other common camera formats are welcome.
landing.features.f3.title: Original quality stays original
landing.features.f3.text: We keep the file your guest selected. No social-media compression and no downsizing.
landing.features.f4.title: Private EU storage
landing.features.f4.text: 100 GB for each gallery, stored in the EU for one year with GDPR-conscious handling.
landing.faq.title: Questions, answered
landing.faq.q1: Do my guests need to install anything?
landing.faq.a1: No. Scanning the QR code opens a web page where they pick a photo and upload it. It works on any phone with a camera and a browser.
landing.faq.q2: Which file types can guests upload?
landing.faq.a2: Almost anything a phone or camera normally creates, including JPG, PNG, HEIC, GIF, TIFF, MP4, MOV, WebM, AVI and 3GP. A single file can be up to 2 GB.
landing.faq.a3: Only people with the gallery link or QR code can open it. You can also turn guest downloads off and collect uploader names.
landing.faq.a4: Every gallery remains available for one year from creation. Download the originals at any time during that period.
landing.final.title: Ready when you are
landing.final.subtitle: Create the QR gallery your guests will actually use.
landing.final.note: One payment. No subscription. 14-day money-back guarantee.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.meta_description: Simple one-time pricing for a 100 GB QR photo and video gallery. €19 personal or €29 commercial. No subscription.
pricing.hero_subtitle: The same simple gallery at both tiers — choose the license that fits how you use it.
pricing.free_note: Try it out — no credit card
pricing.feature_guest_zip: Download every original in one ZIP
pricing.support_body: Write us — we answer fast, usually the same day.
pricing.faq.a1: No. It is a one-time payment with no automatic renewal and no recurring charges.
pricing.faq.q2: What is the difference between Personal and Commercial?
pricing.faq.a2: Both include the full gallery, 100 GB, original-quality photos and videos, QR downloads and one year of access. Commercial adds the right to use it for clients, customers, company events and paid work, plus priority support.
pricing.faq.q3: What does the free plan include?
pricing.faq.a3: Up to %d prompts per event, print-ready QR cards and poster, and one photo per prompt.
pricing.faq.q4: How many prompts can I add?
pricing.faq.a4: Standard allows %d prompts per event, Premium %d. Most events use far fewer.
pricing.faq.a5: Your account is upgraded within seconds. All paid features unlock immediately for every event you own.
pricing.faq.a6: If you haven't used it for your event yet, you get your money back within 14 days — just send us an email.
create.title: Create your QR photo gallery
create.meta_description: Name your gallery, choose a look and get your QR code in minutes.
create.hero_subtitle: A name, an optional date, and a look. That is all we need.
create.event.title: Your event
create.event.date_hint: Used on your printable QR poster. You can leave it empty.
create.prompts.title: Photo prompts
create.prompts.subtitle: What should your guests capture? Every prompt becomes its own QR code (or one shared code hands them out one by one).
create.prompts.empty: No prompts yet — add your first one below.
create.starters.title: Need inspiration?
create.starters.subtitle: Tap to add a starter prompt — edit the list any time.
create.starters.p1: A group photo of your table
create.starters.p2: The dance floor at its peak
create.starters.p6: The most beautiful detail of the venue
create.starters.p7: A photo with someone you just met
create.starters.p8: The food that deserves a photo
create.design.title: Pick a look
create.design.subtitle: This colors the upload page and printable QR poster.
create.qr_mode.title: How do you want to hand out prompts?
create.qr_mode.subtitle: You can switch modes later at any time.
create.qr_mode.option_cards_hint: A printable deck — place one card per table or spot. Each card has its own QR code.
create.qr_mode.option_single_hint: A single poster QR — each scan hands the guest the next prompt automatically.
create.limit.warning: Your plan allows up to %d prompts.
create.errors.event_name: Please enter a name for your event.
create.errors.prompts_empty: Add at least one prompt before continuing.
create.errors.prompts_too_many: That's more prompts than your plan allows.
create.actions.note: We will ask you to sign in so the gallery stays safely connected to you.
create.upgrade_error.title: Prompt limit reached
create.upgrade_error.message: Your plan allows up to %d prompts per event. Upgrade to add more.

overview.title: Gallery dashboard
overview.meta_description: Manage your gallery, QR code, uploads and download settings.
overview.plan.label: Plan:
overview.upgrade.title: Unlock 100 GB and unlimited uploads
overview.upgrade.subtitle: One payment, no subscription — your gallery stays available for a year.
overview.upgrade.benefit_qr_download: Bare QR downloads for DIY material
overview.prompts.title: Your prompts
overview.design.title: Design
overview.design.explain: The palette themes the guest upload page and QR poster.
overview.language.title: Event language
overview.language.explain: The language your guests see when they scan a QR code, and the language of your printed material.
overview.language.label: Language
overview.language.hint: Applies to guest pages and print PDFs.
overview.qr_mode.title: Distribution mode
overview.qr_mode.explain: How guests receive their prompts. Switching is free and instant — reprint your material afterwards.
overview.qr_mode.option_cards_hint: A printable deck with one QR code per prompt.
overview.qr_mode.option_single_hint: A single poster QR — each scan hands out the next prompt.
overview.qr_mode.download_hint: Prefer to design your own cards or signs? Download the bare QR codes.
overview.qr_mode.download_locked: Bare QR downloads are part of the paid plans.
overview.settings.title: Guest settings
overview.settings.commercial_only: Collect uploader names and control guest downloads with the Commercial plan.
overview.settings.lock_after_submit_hint: After submitting, a guest's phone is locked to the gallery — good for contests.
overview.settings.disable_guest_download: Guests can browse the gallery but not download it as a ZIP.
overview.settings.guest_download_locked: Guest downloads are part of the paid plans.
overview.settings.collect_guest_name_hin: Adds a required name field to the upload form so you can see who took each photo.
overview.support.title: Need help?
overview.support.body: Questions about printing, prompts or anything else — we're happy to help.
overview.danger.title: Delete gallery
overview.danger.explain: Permanently removes this gallery and every original file in it.
overview.danger.confirm: Delete this gallery and every file? This cannot be undone.
qr_download.locked.title: Upgrade to download QR files
qr_download.locked.message: Bare QR code downloads are part of the paid plans. Your printable PDF is always free.
gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.meta_description: All original photos and videos uploaded to your gallery.

gallery.empty.body: Share the QR code with guests. Their photos and videos will appear here instantly.
gallery.delete_confirm: Delete this photo? This cannot be undone.
